RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF GARY COHEN's Mtn To Tax defendant Handlery Hotel's memorandum of costs -- Granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/CW-X) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patrick J. Richard, Esq. of NOSSAMAN 438-7278 for defendant HANLERY HOTELS demurring party
Ronald D. Foreman, Esq. of FOREMAN & BRASSO 433-3475 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the adopted its tentative ruling with the exception that Mr. Foreman withdraws his claim for declaratory relief. Therefore, the 6th Cause of Action is ordered dismissed without prejudice. However, 1st Cause of Action (rescission) -- overruled.
Re 2nd Cause of Action (implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing) -- sustained without leave to amend. 20 days leave to answer. Notice waived in open court. (JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
